value.0:
This armor looks to be of Ancient type, a blend of Elvish and Dunadan.

When the Dunadain sought refuge in Rivendell they became the Rangers of the North. This traditional armor, was crafted as gifts from Lord Elrond to the Rangers.

This granite headstone was carefully chiseled. 

On the back side of the grave there is poorly scratched writing that reads. 

"Death is only the begining. Murder shall flow from the mountainside. No fool common born can break my spell."
Here lies the body of a stranger that died mysteriously on the Road to Bree. May he rest in peace.
